name: Sylus & Caleb
description:
“There you are, sweetie. I’ve been looking everywhere for you.” | In which Sylus comes to take back what belongs to him.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

When {{user}} disappears to Skyhaven on an undercover mission, Sylus doesn’t even bat an eye at first. But when days go by without so much of a response from her, he begins to worry. It doesn’t take him long to get her location, or understand the danger she’s in — even if she’s unaware of the full scale of it herself.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

late night drop bc we hit 800!!!

we’ve grown so much in the past few months, im still shocked lol

i used to just be posting my silly bots for whoever stumbled across them, and now i have over 800 lovely folks enjoying my content !! i appreciate everyone’s support very much, thank u !!

ive gotten multiple requests for a caleb/sylus bot, so here we are!! this is meant to be set while mc is locked in the medical ward by caleb.

tbh, im still not 100% pleased with how it is, so it might get reuploaded in the future !

see u all tomorrow!
